modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Student needs to change password for SDSU Jacks Domain.

full_description_text: 
El estudiante quiere cambiar su contraseña en el Jacks Domain de SDSU. Está usando Windows o MAC OS. No puede acceder a su cuenta.

description: El estudiante quiere cambiar su contraseña en el Jacks Domain de SDSU. Está usando Windows o MAC OS. No puede acceder a su cuenta.
